You know how every liquid can be categorized as a soup, stew, or other naming convention for liquid intended to be consumed, and have advantage on checks to postulate the nature of an otherwise uncategorized liquid food.

reward.name: Looks away from camera...
entries: You always know what direction to look away from the camera.
{@i Made by Aris}

reward.name: Looks at camera...
entries: You always know what direction to look at the camera.
{@i Made by Aris}

reward.name: Loooooooong Limbed
entries: {@i Prerequisite: Construct, Ooze, or Undead}

You can detach a limb to use it as a Grappling hook. While detached, each limb can extend up to 100ft out from you, functioning as a rope tied to your body. You maintain no control over the limb while it is detached.
{@i Perk of Grappling Hook. Made by June.}

reward.name: Lucky Day
entries: When you make a {@dice D20} Test or a damage roll, you can choose to add a +1 bonus to the roll. You must finish a Long Rest before you can do so again.
{@i Made by Aris, from WM3}

reward.name: Mag-nificent!
entries: You have Advantage on any ability check made to appraise or inspect a highly detailed item. You can also light a fire with if you have light as bright as sunlight to focus, tinder to ignite. It takes about 5 minutes for the fire to ignite.
{@i Made by Landon}

reward.name: Master Jacker
entries: You have Advantage on checks made to chop down trees, chop lumber, and similar lumberjack activities.
{@i Made by June}

reward.name: Melody of your Destruction
entries: You know how to perform [this song](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=bMW1kYrFI0M). While singing this song in the ocean, you can take the Influence action, making a DC 50 Charisma (Performance) check. On a success, you summon a [Kraken](https://5e.tools/bestiary.html#kraken_xmm). It is Hostile to you and tries to kill you. Once you are dead, or when it is Bloodied, it flees. On a failure or after it flees, you are unable to attempt to summon it again for one week.
{@i Made by June}

reward.name: Mental Spirit Connection
entries: You were possessed by a spirit, and its connection to you still lingers, just a little.

You can use a Magic action to open a mental connection with a specific spirit, decided by the GM when you gain this perk. This connection lasts for ten minutes. While the connection is open, you can communicate with the spirit, which can respond telepathically.
{@i Made by V}

reward.name: Monkey Paw
entries: One of your hands is now simian in form, resembling the paw of a monkey. When the Wish spell is cast within 1 mile of you, the paw twitches uncontrollably.
{@i Made by Sam}

reward.name: Monster Masher
entries: You have Advantage on Charisma (Performance, Persuasion) checks made to convince a Monstrosity or Undead to join an ongoing dance.
{@i Made by June}

reward.name: Most Excellent
entries: {@i Prerequisite: Psionics}
Your mind has expanded, allowing you to passively detect thoughts. You are capable of accurately guessing what number someone is thinking of, so long as it is 69.
{@i Made by Tyler}

reward.name: Musical Genius
entries: {@i Prerequisite: Proficiency in an Instrument}
You can play Instruments you are Proficient with using your feet.
{@i Made by June}

reward.name: My Dark and Twisted Mind
entries: Crazy straws look like regular straws to a twisted freakazoid like you.
{@i Made by Chrys}

reward.name: Neurotoxin
entries: {@i Prerequisite: Cunning Strike, Soulknife Rogue}
You do not need a Poisoner's Kit on your person to use the Poison option of Cunning Strike on attacks with your Psychic Blades.
{@i Made by Aris}

reward.name: Nice Shot!
entries: When a creature within 30ft of you rolls a 20 or a 1 on a {@dice d20} test, you can use your reaction to create an illusion of the words “Nice Shot!” 1 foot in front of them.
This illusion goes away after 6 seconds have passed.
{@i Made by Marvin}

reward.name: Non-Combustible Non-Fire
entries: {@i Prerequisite: Transmuted Spell}

When you change the damage type of a spell from Fire to another type with Transmuted Spell, if the spell would cause flammable objects in the area that aren't being worn or carried to start burning, you can have it not do so.
{@i Made by Landon}

reward.name: Non-Combustible Non-Fire but for Scribes
entries: {@i Prerequisite: Awakened Spellbook}

When you replace the damage type of a spell from Fire to another type with Awakened Spellbook, if the spell would cause flammable objects in the area that aren't being worn or carried to start burning, you can have it not do so.
{@i Based on Landon's Perk. Modified by June.}

reward.name: Opening Tap
entries: You can use any hard blunt object, such as a pommel of a blade or another lock, as Thieves' Tools for the purposes of opening a nonmagical lock.
{@i From S3, Inspired by the 3.5e Opening Tap skill trick, Made by Aris}

reward.name: Origami Séance
entries: You can fold a paper fortune teller from a sheet of Paper or Parchment in 1 minute.

You can spend 1 minute with another creature, using a paper fortune teller you fold, to give the creature an omen about a course of action they plan to take within the next 30 minutes. At the end of the ritual, the other creature is given an omen as if by the results of an Augury spell.
You cannot perform this divination trick accurately again for the next 7 days. The results of any rituals you perform before then are entirely random.
{@i Made by Aris}

reward.name: Owlbears are Owl Bears!
entries: {@i Made by Landon}

reward.name: Pattern Seeking Brain
entries: You can occasionally recognize patterns. Sometimes they’re actually there.
{@i Made by Tyler}

reward.name: Perfectly Styled
entries: Your hair is magical, being able to change and visually react depending on the situation. This effect is chosen when the perk is given out. If you gain this perk a 2nd time, the new effect replaces the previous one. If Dispel Magic or similar magic is cast targeting your hair, the effect stops working until you finish a Short Rest.
Some possible effects:

items: Your hair changes color depending on your mood
Your hair grows and shrinks depending on how much health you have
Your hair becomes fire-red when you cast a spell that deals fire damage
Your hair always blows majestically in the wind

entries: {@i Made by June}

reward.name: Pickle Sense 🥒
entries: When there is a pickle within 5 feet of you, you can taste it.
{@i Made by Chrys}

reward.name: Planar Patience
entries: Your time waiting in the otherworldly waiting rooms that seem to somehow permeate reality has given you a peace that transcends any mortal delay. You cannot be bored, no matter how long you wait.
{@i Made By Rob, From WM1}

reward.name: Please notice me.
entries: {@i Prerequisite: Umbral Sight}
{@i "WHY DO I KEEP EVADING MY ALLIES I WANT THEM TO KNOW WHERE I AM?!?!?!"}
While entirely in Darkness, you can choose what creatures you become Invisible to using your Umbral Sight.
{@i Made by June}

reward.name: Pogo
entries: You can jump off of creatures of your size or larger as if they were solid ground.
{@i Made by Aris}

reward.name: Prehensile Tail
entries: You have a prehensile tail. You can hold objects and make unarmed strikes with it but cannot manipulate, wield, or use objects with your tail.
{@i Made by Aris, Repassed from WM3}

reward.name: Proper Psionic Stance
entries: {@i Prerequisite: Telepathy of at least 30 feet}

As a Magic action while your hands are empty, you can place them on your temples to enter a proper psionic stance. While in this stance, you are Incapacitated, Immobilized, and the distance of your Telepathy increases by 10 feet. You can exit this stance at the start of your turn (No action required).
{@i Made by June}

reward.name: Question for the Producer...
entries: When a session finishes, you (the player) can ask the GM 1 question. The GM must answer (though not necessarily truthfully)
{@i Wait, you could always just do this.}
{@i Made by Landon}

reward.name: Ratapult
entries: {@i Prerequisite: Can cast Catapult}
When you cast Catapult, you can target a Rat to launch instead of an object.
{@i Made by June}

reward.name: Resonant Frequency
entries: Your body has been tuned to a specific frequency, tuning you to a plane of existence. You can be used as a tuning fork for that plane of existence.
{@i Made by June}

reward.name: RGB Magic
entries: Whenever you create Light from a spell or other magical effect, you are able to choose the color of the light. You can alternatively choose for the color to slowly change between multiple colors of your choice.
{@i Made by June}

reward.name: Rise from Death
entries: When you are revived from being dead, you can immediately stand up from being Prone.

reward.name: Rothé IRA
entries: At the end of each week, for every 1 gold piece that a Deep Rothé is carrying for you, 2 copper appear in its possession.
{@i Made by Aris, Repassed from WM3}

reward.name: Santa Initiate
entries: You can squeeze into Chimneys as small as 1 inch and have Advantage on Strength (Athletics) checks made to climb in them.
{@i Made by June}

reward.name: Scrooge
entries: When you fall into a pile of coins, you don't suffer damage from falling. You are able to swim in piles of coins as if they were a liquid. While in a pile of coins, you have a Swim Speed equal to your Speed.
{@i Made by June}

reward.name: Shark Teeth
entries: You can deal Piercing damage instead of Bludgeoning damage when you make an Unarmed Strike with your teeth. In addition, if you lose a tooth, you regrow it in 1 hour.
{@i Made by Aris, Repassed from WM3}

reward.name: Shielding Arm
entries: {@i Prerequisite: Shield Training}

As an Action while your hand is empty, you can shift your stance to one of defense. While in this stance, you can use your empty hand as a donned shield. While in this stance, you can't hold or manipulate items in that hand. You can exit this stance as an Action.
{@i Made by Landon}

reward.name: Shielding Stance
entries: {@i Prerequisite: Shield Training}

As a Utilize action while holding a weapon, you can shift the way you hold one of your weapons you are holding to a stance of defense. While in this stance, treat the weapon as a shield. While in this stance, you can't make attacks with that weapon.

Additionally while in this stance, you can't be disarmed of that weapon, and it takes a Utilize action to drop the weapon, thereby ending the stance. You can also exit this stance as a Utilize action.
{@i From S3, Made by Aris}

reward.name: Silence of the Moigs
entries: {@i Prerequisite: 20 INT}
A moigno agreed to teach you its language as long as you help find pi. You can speak and understand Moignese.
{@i Made by Lily}

reward.name: Silly Guy
entries: You have a tiny spirit resembling a creature (Chosen when you receive this perk) that constantly follows you. It can emote in response to what is going on around you, but it has no statblock, cannot perform any actions, and cannot convey any useful information. The Silly Guy adapts to any environment, changing its form to accommodate including allowing it to swim, fly, or move in any other way. If it is ever more than 60 ft from you, it instantly teleports to your side.
As a Magic action you can dismiss any number of Silly Guys you have. You can resummon any number of Silly Guys as a Magic action.
You can receive this perk multiple times, gaining a different Silly Guy of the DMs choice each time.
{@i Made by June}

reward.name: Slap of Life
entries: You can take the Help action to try to stabilize via slap a creature with 0 Hit Points, which requires a successful DC 10 Strength (Athletics) check.
{@i Made by June}

reward.name: Slop eater
entries: You can eat slop with no ill effects (though this does not affect the taste). Eating a pound of slop provides enough nourishment to sustain you for a day.
{@i Made by Ellie}

reward.name: Slop Lover
entries: All slop tastes good.
{@i Made by Chrys}

reward.name: Sloppy Style
entries: When you make a Wisdom (Chef's Utensils) check in order to prepare food, you can choose to roll a 1 on the die. When you do so the food becomes inedible, providing no nutrition.
{@i Made by June}

reward.name: Snowsense
entries: {@i Prerequisite: Dwarf}
You can use your stonecunning feature's Tremorsense while in or touching snow or ice, as well as stone.
{@i Made by June}

reward.name: Specific Knowledge: [Topic]
entries: You gain a +5 bonus to ability checks you make about that topic. The checks must only apply if it makes sense to apply to the topic. This bonus does not stack when using a Book.
{@i Original by Aris, Reworked by Landon}

reward.name: Specific Phrase
entries: ‘Hello. I am fleeing the Human century of humiliation. Can you show me where to buy some Healing Potions?’

You have been taught how to say a specific phrase or request in a language you might not otherwise understand, and are able to repeat the phrase without error. This can be used to communicate to someone who speaks that language, and would prevent any Disadvantage that would come from being unable to communicate directly.
This perk must be given out in the form of Specific Phrase: [Phrase] ([Language])

reward.name: Spirit of Encouragement
entries: {@i In times of stress, a small incorporeal spirit manifests behind you, holding onto your back. This spirit provides encouragement and consoles negative emotions.}
When forced to make a saving throw to avoid falling into despair or otherwise allowing a form of sadness to take hold of you, you roll that saving throw with Advantage.
In addition, a creature with this perk is convinced that luck is on their side, even when that might not be the case.
{@i Keep on rushing forward!}
{@i (Revote from Westmarch Season 2 & Season 3), Made by Patrick}

reward.name: Spirit of the Barfly
entries: You are immune to the Poisoned condition resulting from being drunk.
{@i Made by Tyler}

reward.name: Spirit of the Brawler
entries: While having the Poisoned condition as a result of being drunk, you have a +1 to damage dealt by your Unarmed Strikes.
{@i Made by Tyler}

reward.name: Spirit of the Grifter
entries: While having the Poisoned condition as a result of being drunk, you have a +1 to Charisma (Deception) and Dexterity (Sleight of Hand) checks.
{@i Made by Tyler}

reward.name: Spirit of the Rabble Rouser
entries: While having the Poisoned condition as a result of being drunk, you have a +1 to checks you make as part of the Influence action.
{@i Made by Tyler}

reward.name: Spore Master
entries: {@i Prerequisite: level 5, can cast animate dead}

When you cast animate dead targeting a corpse, you can choose to animate the corpse with spores instead of negative energy. When cast in this way, the target becomes a spore servant. A spore servant uses the zombie statistics with the following changes:
{@i  The servant is a Plant, not an Undead,
{@i  The servant's alignment becomes Unaligned,
{@i  The servant's Intelligence is 2 (-4) and its Charisma is 1 (-5),
{@i  The servant has Blindsight with a radius of 30 feet, and is blind beyond this radius,
{@i  The servant loses the undead fortitude trait and its Darkvision,
{@i  The servant loses its languages,

You can target this spore servant with Animate Dead as if it was an undead creature. The spore servant remains animated for 30 days, or until it is reduced to 0 Hit Points. You cannot reanimate the corpse as a spore servant in this way again.
{@i Based on the spore servant template in the Monster Manual, and made in consideration of Spores Druids, which get animate dead as a spell. From S3. Made by Aris}

reward.name: Stabilizer
entries: {@i Prerequisite: Medicine Proficiency}
You can take the Help action to stabilize an Unconscious creature that has 0 Hit Points without needing to make a Wisdom (Medicine) check.
{@i Perk of Healer's Kit. Made by June}

reward.name: Static Electrocutor
entries: As an Action, you can build up static electricity by rubbing your hands, shuffling your feet, or another similar action. The next time you touch a creature or metal object, or hit a creature with an Unarmed Strike, you also deal 1 Lightning damage and take 1 Lightning damage.
{@i Made by Aris, Repassed from WM3}

reward.name: Stick the Landing!
entries: When you hit the ground after jumping, you only take fall damage for every 10 feet you are below where you started the jump. If anything interrupts your jump (i.e. You jump and climb a rope, or are magically lifted up before landing) you do not receive this benefit.
{@i by June}

reward.name: Stone Good 40 lasnglo Horrible Villain
entries: {@i Prerequisite: Aberration, Recipient}

You have become a saved the 40 gallons of liquids horrible entity. As an Villain action, you can steal away an villain Tough Boss whose time has come. When you do so, roll a {@dice d20}: on a 5-20, one of my allies disintegrates, on an 1-4, one of the player characters disintegrates.
This stone alienist does not make you immune to getting disintegrated by Ruinstone orcs and held in Antibarrelruins.
{@i Made by Denny}

reward.name: Stone Turning SFX
entries: While Petrified, you are able to rotate your body on its vertical axis.
Once you use this, you cannot again until you finish a Short Rest
{@i Made by June}

reward.name: Street Juggler
entries: {@i Prerequisite: Juggling Training}
You can use any object or item that weighs less than 1 lb as a Juggling Club.
{@i Made by June}

reward.name: Tactical Backflip
entries: {@i Made by Christopher}

reward.name: Tamed Beast
entries: {@i Prerequisite: Beast Master}
When your Beast of the Land or Sea hits, you can choose to not Prone or Grapple the target.
{@i Made by Aris}

reward.name: Taunt!
entries: You provoke a creature with a pose or a short phrase.
You gain a +1 bonus to checks that are part of the Influence action to make a creature Hostile towards you.
{@i Made by Marvin}

reward.name: Taxi!
entries: As an Influence action, you can try to summon private transportation. Sometime between your next turn and forever later, up to GM's discretion, such transportation will arrive, though they will still charge a fare. (Regular fees are 3 cp per mile, or 1 cp for inner-city travel).
{@i Made by Landon}

reward.name: Tenser's Floating Chair
entries: {@i Prerequisite: Can cast Tenser's Floating Disk}
When you cast Tenser's Floating Disk you can make it shaped like a chair.
{@i Made by June}

reward.name: That's Odd
entries: {@i Prerequisite: Investigation Proficiency}

When you enter a new location, such as a room or corridor, you immediately notice one thing out of the ordinary. The GM determines what it is, or whether there's nothing reasonable to pick up, skipping obvious clues that can be easily noticed without a check or specifically looking for them. You learn only that an area or object is suspicious, but not why it's suspicious. For example, if you entered a study with a large bloodstain on the ground, the bloodstain is so obviously suspicious it's evident to you already, so the GM might note that there's something suspicious about the desk drawer instead. You would then need to investigate the drawer further to find out what specifically is out of the ordinary.

That's Odd doesn't reveal whether creatures are suspicious. You don't typically get any benefit when you leave and come back to a place, though if a major change has happened there and time has passed, the GM might determine that you do.
{@i From Pathfinder 2e}

reward.name: The Bees Knees
entries: All wasps, hornets, and bees within 15 feet of you telepathically give you compliments, and ordinary versions of such creatures (not swarms or otherwise) are Charmed by you while within 15 feet of you.
You count as a hellwasp for the sake of a hellwasp's telepathy.
{@i Repassed from WM3, made by Aris}

reward.name: The Coolest 😎
entries: As a Magic action, you can cause a pair of sunglasses to materialize over your eyes, or if you already have a pair of sunglasses materialized from this perk, you cause them to dematerialize.
{@i Repassed from WM3, Made by Chrys}

reward.name: Thrall to Demon
entries: You formally supplicate yourself to a demon prince. In return for this obedience, you gain a small measure of the demon prince's power.

While performing an evil or chaotic act, you can call upon your demonic patron and gain a +1 bonus on {@dice D20} test. Once you gain this benefit, you cannot do so again until you finish a Long Rest.
{@i From 3.5e}
{@i Made by Aris, Repassed from WM3}

reward.name: Tiny Wings
entries: You have a very tiny pair of wings on your back, granting you the ability to fly.
As an action you can grant yourself a Fly Speed of 5ft that lasts until the end of your turn.
{@i Repassed from WM3, Made by June}

reward.name: Transfigured Claws
entries: One or more of your hands have been transformed by magic, sharpening their ends. When you damage a target with an Unarmed Strike using a transformed hand, you can change the damage type to be Piercing or Slashing damage.
{@i Repassed from WM3, Made by Aris}

reward.name: TRANSFORMATION!!!!
entries: {@i Prerequisite: Aarakocra, Kenku, Owlin}

As a Magic ACTION!!!! (action), you can shout “TRANSFORMATION!!!!” to shift to a different form with long, slender legs, otherwise reminiscent of your standard appearance. Your speech patterns shift to encourage exclamative OBSERVATIONS!!!! of SITUATIONS!!!!, generally as single nouns ending in -tion. You can shift back as a Magic ACTION!!!! (action).
{@i Made by Miel}

reward.name: True Bovinity
entries: {@i Prerequisite: Bovinity}
You are proficient with Cow Tools.
{@i Made by Denny}

reward.name: True Unleashed Pocket Sand Hypermastery
entries: {@i Prerequisite: Dirty Tactics}
{@i 'So... We're even now, right?'}
When a creature fails its saving throw against your Dirty Tactics, it takes an additional 1 Piercing damage.
{@i Made by Denny}

reward.name: Uncanny Hat Gravitation
entries: Hats you wear can't be removed from you by wind, ocean currents, or other such elements of nature. Creatures or effects that specifically attempt to remove a hat from you can still do so, however.
{@i Made by Christopher}

reward.name: Unleashing... My True... Power....!!!
entries: As a Magic action, you can tense up, as a 10 foot Emanation amasses around you. You choose its appearance. This Emanation remains until the end of your next turn.
{@i From S3, Made by Aris}

reward.name: Unloving Mother
entries: As a Magic action, you can lose a Silly Guy Perk of your choice.

{@b Cursed.} After taking this action, your alignment becomes Evil and you have Disadvantage on all Charisma {@dice D20} Tests until it is restored. If you are already Evil aligned when you take the action, you do not suffer from this Disadvantage.
{@i Made by June}

reward.name: Up the Hill
entries: {@i Prerequisite: Proficiency in Athletics}
{@i "When I was a kid I used to walk to school uphill both ways"}
You can run up steep inclines or stairs without it costing extra movement (if the GM would rule it as costing extra movement).
{@i From S3, Made by Aris}

reward.name: Vecna's Most Vile Technique
entries: You have Advantage on Dexterity (Sleight of Hand) checks to steal candy from a baby.
{@i Made by June}

reward.name: VFX Team
entries: Actions and effects on and from you are accompanied by suitable and tasteful visual effects, such as sparkles, or fun backgrounds.
{@i From WM3, by Landon}

reward.name: wans
entries: When True Resurrection is casted to revive you by speaking your name, an alternate name can be used in order to revive you. This alternate name is determined by using the first letter of your first name and then adding -ans to the end.
{@i Made by Denny}

reward.name: We some kinda
entries: Once per session, you can attempt to naturally incorporate the title of a session into a line of dialogue. The GM (and your party, at the GM's discretion) decides if you used the title drop well. If so, you gain Advantage on your next roll. If not, you take {@dice 2d8} Psychic damage.
{@i From WM3, Made by Ryan Gabrillo}

reward.name: Well Traveled
entries: You have expert knowledge on the layout of an area (Chosen when you receive this perk).
You have a +5 bonus to Wisdom (Survival) checks you make to find your way in the area. This bonus does not stack with Maps.
You can receive this perk multiple times, gaining knowledge in a different area.
{@i Perk of Map, Made by June}

reward.name: Werewoof
entries: Your barks are nearly identical to those of a canine.
{@i Repassed from WM3, Made by Landon}

reward.name: Wet Sender
entries: When you cast Sending, you can accompany the message with a feeling of wetness that the receiver feels.

reward.name: Winter's Respite
entries: As long as you remain dry, you automatically succeed on saving throws against the effects of extreme cold, as if you were wearing cold weather clothing.
{@i Made by Aris}

reward.name: Why do they call it oven when you of in the cold food of out hot eat the food
entries: {@i Prerequisite: Built-in Oven}
You have advantage on Cook's Utensils checks made to cook using your body.
{@i Made by June}

reward.name: You are F###ing DEAD.
entries: You can turn your eyes {@b red} when you are angry...
{@i Made by Denny}

reward.name: You Punched The Highlights Out Of Her Hair!
entries: {@i He punched the highlights out of her hair!}

When you score a Critical Hit on a melee attack roll against a creature, you may ask the GM to describe said creature again. With the attack, in addition to damage, you destroy a superficial, cosmetic feature of the creature (such as a tall top hat, gilding on a set of pauldrons, or dyed highlights in hair).
{@i Made by Ryan(VP)}

reward.name: Aberrated Limb
entries: One of your limbs has been twisted by concentrated exposure to the Far Realm, Limbo, or other chaotic energies. The effects depend on which limb is altered.

Arm. An aberrated arm transforms into a tentacle, stretched appendage, or similar. The hand can no longer hold items or perform somatic components. Your Unarmed Strikes with that hand now have a reach of 10 feet.
Leg. An aberrated leg becomes a tentacle, spider leg, or similar. Your Speed decreases by 10 feet, but you gain a Climb Speed of 10 feet.
{@i Made by Lily}

reward.name: Aberrative Shift
entries: A residual wash of aberrative taints your system. As a Magic action, you can call upon it to edit small details of your appearance. Not enough to make you unrecognizable or imitate a specific person, but enough to be noticeable. Each time you do so, roll {@dice 1d4}. On a 1, the shift goes slightly awry, resulting in slightly uncanny features, slimy purple flesh, spiny outcrops, or similar. On a 4, one such aberration fades, returning to your natural appearance.
{@i Made by Lily}

reward.name: …And We Are Live!
entries: When you cast Sending you can choose to overlay the first half of the message on top of the words of the other half, rendering the other half of the message unintelligible.
{@i Inspired by Tay Zonday playing Team Fortress 2 after 0:21, Made by Denny}

reward.name: Cipher Expert
entries: {@i From the 2014 Linguist Feat. Made by Gavin}

reward.name: Confusing Feet
entries: While barefoot, you can have them leave tracks like those of any kind of Humanoid of your size.
{@i Talent of Boots of False Tracks. Made by June}

reward.name: Cumin
entries: As a Magic action, you can magically produce a pinch of cumin in your hand. This pinch is enough to season a single meal. Once you use this talent, you cannot use it again until you finish a Short or Long Rest.
{@i Made by Denny}

reward.name: Dark Speech Novice
entries: You have managed to learn a word in Dark Speech, though you lack the proper magical protection to speak it. As a Magic action, you can attempt to speak this word, and you die.
{@i Made by Aris, Repassed from WM3}

reward.name: Extra Liver
entries: You have Advantage on saving throws made against alcohol.
{@i Made by June}

reward.name: Feet of a Zephyr
entries: {@i +2 Aura. You are BEYOND shoes.}
You can take a Magic action to appear to float 4 inches above a surface. This effect lasts until you take another Magic action to end it.
{@i Made by Althaea}

reward.name: Find Flumiliar
entries: When you cast Find Familiar, you can choose for the familiar to take the form of a Flumph. If you choose this form, the creature's type is Aberration.
{@i Made by Aris}

reward.name: Flip the Bird
entries: As an Action, you can make an offensive gesture using a free hand toward a creature within 30 feet of you. If the target can see you it must succeed on a DC 10 Wisdom saving throw or take 1 Psychic damage. Regardless of the outcome of the save, the target's attitude towards you worsens. Either from Friendly to Indifferent or from Indifferent to Hostile.

When you take this Action you can also choose to use an unoccupied hand from an Animated Crawling Claw, Mage Hand, Maximilian's Earthen Grasp, or Bigby's Hand that you control to make the gesture instead. If the hand has a size category, the DC increases by 1 for every size category of the hand above tiny.
{@i Made by Jackson}

reward.name: Freaky
entries: You are considered Proficient with your tongue.
{@i From S3, Originally by June}

reward.name: I like my problems.
entries: When Remove Curse is cast on you, you can choose to prevent a Curse you have from being removed. The creature casting the spell is aware of this, and can force you to make a Wisdom saving throw using its spell save DC. On a failure, the spell removes everything as normal.
{@i Made by June}

reward.name: Juggling Training
entries: {@i Prerequisite: Proficiency in Sleight of Hand or Performance}

You can juggle a number of Juggling Clubs or other small objects in one hand without needing to make an ability check. You can make weapon attacks using any of the Juggling Clubs you are juggling. If you hit an attack with a juggling club you were juggling, it returns to your hand.
{@i Made by June}

reward.name: Leave a Voice Mail
entries: When you receive a Sending, you can choose to delay receiving it.  As a Magic action, you can choose to receive a Sending delayed this way. If you delay a Sending, you cannot respond to it.

reward.name: Let's get the facts!
entries: When you take the Search action, you have Advantage on the next Study action you make before the end of your next turn if you Study whatever you Searched.
{@i Made by Landon}

reward.name: Lucky Thief
entries: {@i No amount of Expertise can stop some good old-fashioned Luck}
You can use a Magic action to attempt to unlock a locked door. This has a 5 percent chance of unlocking any lock. Once you use this ability, you can't use it again until you finish a Long Rest.
{@i Talent of Mystery Key, Made by June}

reward.name: Make a video call and tell me are you afraid ...
entries: {@i Prerequisite: The Scrying Spell Prepared}
When a creature fails their saving throw against your Scrying, you know if they possess the Frightened condition.
{@i Inspired by Scary Baldi Chat Android App, Made by Denny}

reward.name: Non-Alcoholic Drinker
entries: You can drink ale, wine, or any other nonmagical alcoholic beverage without becoming inebriated. This has no effect on magical liquids or harmful substances such as poison.
{@i Talent of Tankard of Sobriety, Made by Marvin}

reward.name: Off-kilter Immune System
entries: Your body’s natural defense system are thrown out of alignment. They overfocus on hostile intruders, granting immunity to disease, but offer less protection against toxins, resulting in Vulnerability to Poison damage.
{@i Made by Lily}

reward.name: only stupid people try the medicine drug. you are stupid.
entries: {@i Prerequisite: Medicine Proficiency}
You have Advantage on Wisdom (Medicine) checks to stabilize creatures after another creature fails to stabilize the target creature.
{@i Made by Miel}

reward.name: Orc of Stone
entries: While holding an orc, you can take a Magic action to determine whether you are within 20 feet of an Orc Stone. This property functions only on the Material Plane.
{@i Made by Denny}

reward.name: Ough, Sour...
entries: {@i Prerequisite: Ooze}
You have learned how to become a living weapon, a sapient amalgam of unripe fruits and scrunched facial expressions. When you are hit by a Bite attack, you may have the attacker take 1 Acid damage.
{@i Made by Christopher}

reward.name: Overclocked Inspiration
entries: {@i Prerequisite: Bard}
A creature that has a Bardic Inspiration die from you can expend, roll, and add it to any {@dice D20} Test they make, not just ones they fail.
{@i Made by Christopher}

reward.name: People-Mover
entries: {@i Prerequisite: Can cast Catapult}

When you cast Catapult, you can target a tiny creature instead of an object. It must succeed on a Constitution saving throw (Save DC equal to the DC of the spell), or be launched. If it strikes something, the creature also takes the damage.
{@i Made by June}

reward.name: Phantom Noises
entries: When you make an illusory sound using a spell, you can choose to exclude creatures from hearing the sound.
{@i Made by Aris}

reward.name: Pinches That Hurt
entries: When you pinch a creature, you can choose to deal 1 Bludgeoning damage.
{@i Made by Chrys}

reward.name: Potable Healer
entries: You can be used as a Potion of Healing. After being consumed, you die and disappear.
{@i Made by Chrys}

reward.name: Psionic Art: Major Entropic Undoing - Ego and Id
entries: {@i Prerequisite: Duergar, Aberrant Mind Sorcerer, Psi Warrior Fighter, Soulknife Rogue, or Great Old One Warlock}

You can take a Magic action to unleash the latent potential of your mind's inner conflicts. When you do so, roll any die to determine the effect, which changes depending on whether the roll resulted in an even or odd number.

{@b Even.} Target one creature you can see within 60 feet of yourself. The target makes a DC 13 Wisdom saving throw. On a failed save, the target takes {@dice 2d4} Psychic damage and has Disadvantage on the next attack roll it makes before the end of its next turn. On a successful save, the target takes half as much damage only.
{@b Odds.} You take {@dice 1d4} Psychic damage.
Once you use this talent, you cannot use it again until you finish a Long Rest.
{@i Talent of Rival Coin, Made by Denny}

reward.name: Rat Whisperer
entries: You can cast Speak with Animals at will. When you cast it this way, you can only speak to rats that you are holding.
{@i Made by June}

reward.name: Sharptooth Training
entries: You’ve trained with the Sharptooth tribe and have learned how to use your teeth in battle.

You can use your teeth to make Unarmed Strikes. When you hit with them, the strike deals {@dice 1d4} + your Strength modifier Piercing damage, instead of the Bludgeoning damage normal for an Unarmed Strike.
{@i Made by Marvin}

reward.name: Slender Legs
entries: Your legs have elongated unnaturally due to aberrative exposure. They are unnaturally gangly, and may have mutated into stranger forms still, like bug legs, animal legs, or something that hardly resembles a leg at all.
The legs are long and spindly, increasing your Speed by 5 feet, but incurring Disadvantage on Acrobatics checks.
{@i Made by Lily}

reward.name: Slightly Ferromagnetic
entries: While suspended in water you function as a compass.
{@i Made by Jackson}

reward.name: Soap Mouth
entries: {@i Prerequisite: Has a mouth}
You can produce a slightly soapy liquid from your mouth, allowing you to blow bubbles from it.
{@i Made by Landon}

reward.name: Soul Building
entries: As a Magic action, you can shape a soul you possess into a nonmagical Tiny or Small object worth no more than 500 GP.
You can use souls as construction material for Bastion turns. Each soul counts for 500 GP of material.

Objects and structures made of souls look like wood, stone, metals, or other materials at a glance. But on a DC 15 Wisdom (Perception) check, a creature can see brief faces of torment and anguish appearing on the object or structure before receding back into the surface of the material.
Destroying the object or structure does not release the soul, instead causing indescribable pain to the soul, and fragmenting it into pieces.
{@i Made by Aris}

reward.name: Space Heater
entries: {@i Prerequisite: Construct}

As an Action you can choose to begin heating the air around you. While heating the air, you generate enough dry heat to keep the temperature within 10 feet of yourself at 95 degrees Fahrenheit (35 degrees Celsius). You can stop heating the air as a Bonus Action.
{@i Talent of Plushie of Warmth, Made by Denny}

reward.name: Special Technique: Dropkick!
entries: Whenever you make an Unarmed Strike against a creature, if you are not Prone or immune to the Prone condition, you may attempt to dropkick your target. The attack deals an additional 2 Bludgeoning damage on a hit, but you become Prone after the attack. You may only make this special attack once per turn.
{@i Made by Patrick}

reward.name: Theme Music
entries: As a Magic action, you can create music in a 120-foot Emanation from you. This music ends when you desire (no action required) or when you become Incapacitated.
{@i Talent of Wand of Conducting, Made by Landon}

reward.name: Throat Pocket
entries: As a Utilize action, you can reach into your mouth and store or remove a Tiny item from your throat. The stored item provides no detriment to breathing, drinking, eating, and talking. You can have one item stored at a time.
{@i Made by Chrys}

reward.name: Tracker's Sense
entries: Through some magical means, you are able to detect the presence of a certain type of creature, determined when you gain this talent. Once determined, the creature type can't be changed.

You know when you are within 300 feet of any creature of that type. This presence could be indicated by varying means, depending on the nature that you gained this talent, and it can be a visual indicator.
{@i Talent of Lantern of Tracking. Made by Aris}

reward.name: Tummy Vision
entries: When you take the Search action, you can target a creature within 5 feet and make a DC 15 Wisdom (Medicine) check. On a success, you can reason what they last ate in the last 24 hours.
{@i Made by Landon}

reward.name: Sign of the Kraken
entries: {@i Prerequisite: Born on the 1st Month, Hammer}
Optimal Career. You have a +2 bonus on Strength (Athletics) checks to swim.
Lucky Action. You have a +1 bonus to Dexterity (Stealth) checks.
Birthstone. You can attune to an Aquamarine. If you do, you gain a +1 AC bonus against melee attacks.

reward.name: Sign of the Basilisk
entries: {@i Prerequisite: Born on the 2nd Month, Alturiak}
Optimal Career. You have a +2 bonus on Charisma (Intimidation) checks.
Lucky Action. You have a +1 bonus to Wisdom (Insight) checks.
Birthstone. You can attune to a Ruby. If you do, you gain a +2 bonus to saving throws against transmutation magic.

reward.name: Sign of the Beholder
entries: {@i Prerequisite: Born on the 3rd Month, Ches}
Optimal Career. You have a +2 bonus on Intelligence checks to decipher codes.
Lucky Action. You have a +1 bonus to Wisdom (Perception) checks.
Birthstone. You can attune to an Agate. If you do, it grants you a +2 bonus to saving throws against illusion magic.

reward.name: Sign of the Harpy
entries: {@i Prerequisite: Born on the 4th Month, Tarsakh}
Optimal Career. You have a +2 bonus on Charisma (Performance) checks that use your voice.
Lucky Action. You have a +1 bonus to Charisma (Deception) checks.
Birthstone. You can attune to a Turquoise. If you do, it grants you a +1 AC bonus against Ranged attacks.

reward.name: Sign of the Ettin
entries: {@i Prerequisite: Born on the 5th Month, Mirtul}
Optimal Career. You have a +2 bonus on Dexterity (Sleight of Hand) checks during combat.
Lucky Action. You have a +1 bonus to Dexterity (Thieves' Tools) checks to disable devices.
Birthstone. You can attune to an Opal. If you do, it grants you a +1 AC bonus against Attacks of Opportunity.

reward.name: Sign of the Dryad
entries: {@i Prerequisite: Born on the 6th Month, Kythorn}
Optimal Career. You have a +2 bonus on Wisdom (Animal Handling) checks.
Lucky Action. You have a +1 bonus to Wisdom (Medicine) checks.
Birthstone. You can attune to a Pearl. If you do, it grants you a +1 AC bonus when there's a friendly creature within 5 feet of you.

reward.name: Sign of the Stirge
entries: {@i Prerequisite: Born on the 7th Month, Flamerule}
Optimal Career. You have a +2 bonus on Intelligence (Alchemy Tools) checks.
Lucky Action. You have a +1 bonus to Constitution saving throws to maintain concentration.
Birthstone. You can attune to an Emerald. If you do, it grants you a +2 bonus to saving throws against enchantment magic.

reward.name: Sign of the Wyvern
entries: {@i Prerequisite: Born on the 8th Month, Eleasis}
Optimal Career. You have a +2 bonus on Wisdom (Survival) checks to forage.
Lucky Action. You have a +1 bonus to Dexterity Saving throws to remain mounted.
Birthstone. You can attune to a Sapphire. If you do, it grants you a +1 AC bonus during a turn where you've moved more than 5 feet.

reward.name: Sign of the Dragon
entries: {@i Prerequisite: Born on the 9th Month, Eleint}
Optimal Career. You have a +2 bonus on Intelligence (Investigation) checks to appraise the value of objects.
Lucky Action. You have a +1 bonus to Wisdom (Perception) checks that require hearing.
Birthstone. You can attune to a Garnet. If you do, whenever you take the Help action, you gain a +1 AC bonus until the start of your next turn.

reward.name: Sign of the Unicorn
entries: {@i Prerequisite: Born on the 10th Month, Marpenoth}
Optimal Career. You have a +2 bonus on Strength (Athletics) checks to climb.
Lucky Action. You have a +1 bonus to Strength (Athletics) checks to Jump.
Birthstone. You can attune to a Topaz. If you do, you gain a +2 bonus on saving throws against poison and disease.

reward.name: Sign of the Hydra
entries: {@i Prerequisite: Born on the 11th Month, Uktar}
Optimal Career. You have a +2 bonus on Charisma (Persuasion) checks to ask for information.
Lucky Action. You have a +1 bonus to Dexterity (Acrobatic) checks.
Birthstone. You can attune to a Diamond. If you do, you gain a +2 AC bonus against attacks made while you are Paralyzed or Unconscious.

reward.name: Sign of the Chimera
entries: {@i Prerequisite: Born on the 12th Month, Nightal}
Optimal Career. You have a +2 bonus on Charisma (Persuasion) checks to make a first impression.
Lucky Action. You have a +1 bonus to Dexterity (Stealth) checks.
Birthstone. You can attune to an Amethyst. If you do, you gain a +2 bonus on saving throws against evocation magic.

reward.name: +X Duelist's Arm
entries: {@i Prerequisite: Shielding Arm}
Your innate shielding techniques have been magically enhanced, making you superior at anticipating and deflecting attacks.
You gain a bonus to your Armor Class while using Shielding Arm, determined by the talent’s rarity.
{@b Rarity: Bonus}
Uncommon: +1
Rare: +2
Very Rare: +3
If you have multiple versions of this talent, you use the highest bonus rather than adding them.
{@i Made by Christopher E}

reward.name: 1500 XXL Westmarch Cypher
entries: At the GM’s discretion, you can record a 30 second to 1 minute long freestyle rap in character. The beat is up to the discretion of the GM (a sample beat is provided [here](https://youtu.be/pRu4l0rBFBo?si=DWvGIvX3YtiQVnZe)). At the conclusion of the freestyle, the GM decides if you produced a banger. If you did, you heal {@dice 2d10} Hit Points, if you didn’t, you take {@dice 2d10} Fire damage. The GM may require that you post the recording in ⁠#wm-discussion to benefit. Once this talent is used, it cannot be used again until one week has passed.
{@i Adapted from WM3, Made by Ryan Gabrillo}

reward.name: Aerial Fighting
entries: You can use the momentum of your strikes to keep you airborne. When you hit a creature with a melee weapon attack while airborne, you can choose to not fall until the end of your next turn.
{@i Made by Aris}

reward.name: Amorphous Stone Carver
entries: You count as an orc for the purposes of receiving and using the Stone Carver talent.
{@i Made by Denny}

reward.name: Appendage Regrowth
entries: You can expend 4 hit dice to regrow a lost limb over the course of a minute, provided you are at least 1 hit point for the entire duration.
{@i Repass from wm3, made by Aris}

reward.name: Balloon Animals
entries: When you cast Find Familiar or Summon Beast, you can summon an inflatable balloon animal. The balloon animal has the Construct creature type, but otherwise behaves as the animal it resembles. The balloon animal is Immune to Psychic and Poison damage. However, it immediately dies if it takes any Piercing damage.
{@i Made by Aris}

reward.name: Blasphemous
entries: You can cast Desecrate (spellcasting ability mod +3) with this talent. When you cast Desecrate this way, the Duration is 1 minute. You can't cast this spell again with this talent until you finish a Long Rest.
{@i Made by Chrys}

reward.name: Blaster Caster
entries: You can cast Scorching Ray with this talent (+5 to hit). You can't cast this spell again with this talent until you finish a Long Rest.
Talent of Circlet of Blasting

reward.name: Blessing of the Goose Mother
entries: You have a +5 bonus to Influence actions made against geese and ducks. Furthermore, geese and ducks won't initially attack you, and are Friendly towards you.
You can communicate simple ideas and concepts to ducks and geese, and can perfectly mimic the quacks of ducks and geese.
{@i Made by Chrys}

reward.name: Blessing? Of the Goose Mother
entries: Your legs become that of a goose. You gain a Swimming Speed of 40 feet.

Whenever you finish a Long Rest, roll {@dice 1d20}. On a 15-19, a Tiny egg appears within 5 feet of you and will hatch into a fully grown goose. On a 20, a Small golden egg instead appears, and will hatch into a fully grown Giant Goose. All eggs hatch after 3 days. Geese hatched from these eggs have no inclination to act a certain way towards you or your allies.
{@i Talent of Ring of Swimming plus geese}
{@i Made by Chrys}

reward.name: Blood Bombs
entries: {@b {@i Siphoned Explosives.}} You may take a Magic action to produce a number of volatile bombs made of your blood equal to your Proficiency Bonus. When you produce bombs, you take {@dice 3d6} necrotic damage per bomb created, which cannot be reduced in any way. These bombs function as regular bombs{@i , but lose their volatility after 1 minute.

{@b {@i Bloodsoaked Bombs.}} All bombs you throw leave behind a pool of corrosive blood in the sphere of the explosion. A creature takes {@dice 1d6} necrotic damage if it ends its turn there. The pool of corrosive blood evaporates at the end of your next turn.
{@i Based on The Binding of Isaac: Repentance.}
{@i Made by Patrick, edited by Miel.}

reward.name: Built-in Oven
entries: {@i Prerequisite: Construct}

You have an internal oven in your body. You can heat the inside of your body up to 500 degrees. It additionally produces endless coals that you can use as Light Hammers that deal Fire damage. You do not need a free hand to make weapon attacks with the coals. The coals cool down and become harmless after 1 minute, or when they are submerged in water. Other creatures cannot use these coals as weapons.
You can cast Heat Metal as a ritual at will, targeting an object placed inside the oven. You are able to hold objects heated this way without any ill effects.
{@i Made by June}

reward.name: Charge Attack!
entries: You charge up an attack, building up power over time.

As an Action, you can add {@dice 1d6} to the damage dice of a melee attack that you do on a subsequent turn.  You can gain additional damage dice from this talent an amount of times equal to your Proficiency Bonus.
You can use this feature only if you haven't moved during this turn, and after you use it, your Speed is 0 until the end of the turn.
If you move before attempting a melee attack, the amount of additional damage dice from this talent is returned to 0.
{@i Made by Marvin}

reward.name: Chemical Imbalance
entries: {@i Prerequisite: Ooze}
{@i Due to exposure to an exotic chemical or maybe hormonal issues, your oozey form has become more unstable.}

As a Magic action you can cause your ooze to change forms for a moment, producing a glob that functions as one of the following items. You can choose to use the item as part of the action. If you choose to not immediately use it, the glob retains its potency for 1 hour, at any point being able to be used as if it was the item.

items: Acid (vial)
Antitoxin (vial)
Basic Poison (vial)
Perfume (vial)
Assassin's Blood (vial)
Oil (flask)
Alchemist's Fire (flask)

entries: You can create a number of items using this Talent equal to your proficiency bonus, regaining all uses on a Long Rest.
{@i Made by June}

reward.name: Chestplate of Preserving
entries: {@i Prerequisite: Warforged}
Your chest cavity has been modified to ensure the survival of anything placed within. Your torso functions as a Chest of Preserving.
{@i Made by Lily}

reward.name: Cold Toes
entries: While barefoot you have a Tremorsense of 30 feet. You must be on snow to use this Tremorsense.
{@i Talent of Boots of Snowsense. Made by June}

reward.name: Create Specter
entries: As a Magic action, you can target a Humanoid corpse within 10 feet of you that hasn't been dead for more than 1 minute. The target's spirit rises as a Specter in the space of the corpse or in the nearest unoccupied space. The Specter is not under your control. You can use this talent again after you complete a Long Rest.
{@i Made by Chrys}

reward.name: Death Burst
entries: Additionally: At gm's discretion, you also explode in extremely awkward social situations.
{@i Made by Xin}

reward.name: Demon Arm
entries: {@i Your arm is possessed by a demon, or demonic essence, transforming to become a more clawed, demonic form.}

You can use your clawed hand to make Unarmed Strikes. When you hit with it, the strike deals {@dice 1d6} + your Strength modifier Slashing damage, instead of the Bludgeoning damage normal for an Unarmed Strike.

When you roll a 1 on an attack roll, you must immediately spend your Reaction to make an Unarmed Strike with your clawed hand against the nearest ally. If there is no ally within reach, you take {@dice 1d8} Necrotic damage.
{@i Made by Aris, Repassed from WM3}

reward.name: Demon Eye
entries: You have Darkvision out to 60 feet. If you already have Darkvision, its range increases by 60 feet.
When you take the Search action and roll a 1 on the die, you are Blinded for the next 10 minutes.
{@i Made by Chrys}

reward.name: Demon Leg
entries: {@i Your leg is possessed by a demon, or demonic essence, transforming to become a more demonic form.}
Your Long Jump is increased by 20 feet, and your High Jump is increased by 10 feet, when you have a running start.

When you roll a 1 on a Strength or Dexterity saving throw, you lose control of your movement. At the start of your next turn, you must choose to either drop Prone, or to use all your movement to move in a random direction.
{@i Made by Aris, Repassed from WM3}

reward.name: Disc of Destruction
entries: {@i Prerequisite: Level 6+ Monk}

As an Action, you can expend 1 Focus Point to focus your internal reservoirs of power into a disc, and throw it at a creature within 120 feet. That creature must make a Dexterity saving throw against your Focus Point DC, taking Force damage equal to three rolls of your Martial Arts die on a failed save.
{@i Made by Landon}

reward.name: Discombobulate
entries: {@i Prerequisite: Cunning Strike}
You gain the following Cunning Strike option.
{@b Discombobulate (Cost: {@dice 4d6}).} The target must succeed on a Constitution saving throw, or its Concentration is broken and it cannot Concentrate until the end of its next turn.
{@i Made by June}

reward.name: Double Jump
entries: As an Action or Bonus Action while airborne, you can make a standing long or high jump from your position in the air.
Once you jump in this way, you cannot do so again until you touch the ground.
{@i Adapted from S3}

reward.name: Elf-to-Elf Communication
entries: {@i Prerequisite: Trance, Non-Drow}
{@i 'Sometimes I talk to myself in order to hear what a real one has to say.' - A quote falsely attributed to Corellon Larethian.}

While you are in trancelike meditation as part of a Long Rest, you can send a short message of 25 words or fewer to an elf you have met within 5 feet of you that is also in trancelike meditation. The target hears the message in its mind and recognizes you as the sender if it knows you. This talent enables targets to understand the meaning of your message.
Once you use this talent your ears perk up like antennae for one minute and you cannot use it again until you finish a Long Rest.
This talent is blocked by 1 foot of stone, dirt, or wood; 1 inch of metal; a thin sheet of lead; or a drow occupying the space between you and your target.
{@i Made by Denny}

reward.name: Engulfer
entries: {@i Prerequisite: Ooze}

As a Magic action, you can attempt to engulf a creature Grappled by you. The creature must make a Strength saving throw. If it is your size or larger, it automatically passes. On a failure, the creature takes {@dice 2d6} Acid damage and becomes Engulfed.

{@b Engulfed.} Any creature engulfed is Suffocating, can't cast spells with a Verbal component, and has the Restrained condition. An engulfed creature can try to escape by taking an action to make a Strength (Athletics) check. On a successful check, the creature escapes and enters the nearest unoccupied space, no longer being engulfed.

As an action, a creature within 5 feet of the cube can attempt to pull out an engulfed creature by succeeding on a Strength (Athletics) check, moving the creature to the nearest unoccupied space on a success, causing it to no longer be engulfed.
The DC for all saves in this talent equals 8 + your proficiency bonus + your strength modifier
{@i Talent of Gelatin Cube. Made by June}

reward.name: Ensnaring Webs
entries: {@i Prerequisite: Ensnaring Strike spell}

When you cast Ensnaring Strike, you can choose to restrain the target with tangling webs instead of vines. When you cast the spell in this way, the target doesn't have Advantage on the save as a result of being Large or larger.

Restrained targets take the Piercing damage from the bites of spectral spiders within the web. You can choose for the spell to deal Piercing damage or Poison damage (you choose when you cast the spell).
The webs are flammable. Webs exposed to fire burn away in 1 round, dealing {@dice 2d4} Fire damage to the target at the start of its turn.

reward.name: Eye for Secrets
entries: {@i Through rigorous training, you have developed a keen eye for secrets and traps.}
As a Magic action you can attempt to detect secrets. If a secret door or trap is within 60 feet of you, you sense the location of the one nearest to you.
You can use this Talent a number of times equal to your Proficiency Bonus, regaining uses on a Long Rest.
{@i Talent of Wand of Secrets, Made by June}

reward.name: Eyes of an Adventurer
entries: {@i "You can see it in their eyes when an adventurer walks through the door" - Random barkeep}
You gain a Darkvision of 60 ft if you do not already have one. Your eyes additionally reflect more light than usual, making them appear to glow in the dark.
You cannot benefit from wearing Goggles of Night.
{@i Made by June}

reward.name: Fish Wrangler
entries: {@i Prerequisite: Monk}

You may wield a creature Grappled by you as an improvised weapon as long as they are at least 1 size category smaller than you. If the creature has a Swim Speed, it instead counts as a monk weapon for you.
{@i Made by Xin}

reward.name: FOOD FIGHT!!!
entries: As an Action, you may shout “FOOD FIGHT!” For the next minute, you are considered proficient in food as an improvised weapon. For this duration, all food you wield has the Finesse and Thrown (30/60 ft.) properties and deals {@dice 1d6} Bludgeoning damage.
{@i Made by Tyler}

reward.name: FORE!
entries: You have great practice in the storied tradition of hitting people with other people. When you have a creature of your size or smaller Grappled, you can use it as an improvised melee weapon that deals {@dice 1d8} Bludgeoning damage plus another {@dice 1d8} for each two sizes above Small. You can’t use a Tiny creature. The grappled creature also takes this damage, but doesn’t suffer any other effects from the attack.
{@i From S3, made by Lily}

reward.name: Forward Throw!
entries: You have the special ability to throw someone you have Grappled.
When you Unarmed Strike Shove a creature you have Grappled, you can push the target equal to 5 times the ability score modifier used for calculating the DC for your Shove.
{@i Made by Marvin}

reward.name: Four Eyes
entries: You have grown an extra set of eyes allowing you to see better.

You have Advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight. In conditions of clear visibility, you can make out details of even extremely distant creatures and objects as small as 2 feet across.
{@i Talent of Eyes of the Eagle. Made by June}

reward.name: Fragment of Evil
entries: You can harness the evil within your soul. You can cast the Vile Dagger spell. Once you cast the spell, you cannot cast it again until you finish a Short or Long Rest. You can also sacrifice one of your Hit Die to cast the spell again.

reward.name: Gambling Addict
entries: When you take the Magic action to toss a Rival Coin, you can toss another Rival Coin that has at least 1 remaining charge as part of the same action provided that it is on your person.
{@i Made by Denny}

reward.name: Gelatinous
entries: {@i Prerequisite: Ooze}

If you remain perfectly still for 10 minutes straight, you can become Invisible. A creature must succeed on a Wisdom (Perception) check (DC equals 8 + your proficiency bonus + your dexterity modifier) in order to spot you. If you move or otherwise act, the effect ends on you.
If a creature attempts to walk into your space while you are Invisible from this ability, you can make an Opportunity Attack against them, ending the condition.
{@i Made by June}

reward.name: Ghost Pipes
entries: {@i Prerequisite: Bard or Musician}

As a Magic action, you can cause one Instrument you touch to float a few feet above the ground and play itself. The Instrument must be intact and in playable condition. The Instrument plays any tune you desire as though a skilled musician were playing it, regardless of whether you can play the instrument in question. If the Instrument weighs 100+ lbs, the Instrument does not float but still plays itself.
The Instrument plays until you choose to end it, or you take this Magic action again.
{@i Adapted from 3.5e, Made by Aris}

reward.name: Graceful Landing
entries: {@i Prerequisite: Acrobatics Proficiency}
Whenever you fall, you always land on your feet. Additionally, your falls count as having fallen 20 less feet for the purposes of taking damage from falling (to a minimum of 0 feet).
{@i Talent of Boots of Landing, Made by June}

reward.name: Halaster's Shaking Hand
entries: {@i Prerequisite: Can cast Bigby’s Hand}

You can use the Grasping Hand option of your Bigby’s Hand spell on another Bigby’s Hand. The other hand automatically fails the Dexterity saving throw to avoid the Grappled condition. While your Bigby's Hand is grappling another, the hands appear to be in a handshake, and the other hand cannot move or cause any of its effect options. The spellcaster in control of the other hand can use its Bonus Action to attempt to break the handshake, making a spellcasting ability check against the escape DC. On a success, the hand breaks free and can move up to 60 feet.
{@i Ported from 3.5e by Aris}

reward.name: Harsh Pacifier
entries: When you use the Influence action to convince a creature to refrain from hostile action towards you and your allies and fail, you can force that creature to make a Wisdom saving throw (DC = 8 + prof bonus + cha mod). On a failure, you cause the creature to suffer one of the following effects:
{@i  The creature takes {@dice 2d6} Psychic damage.
{@i  The creature subtracts {@dice 1d4} from their attack rolls until the end of their next turn.
Once you use this feature, you cannot do so again until you finish a Short or Long Rest.
{@i Made by Chrys}

reward.name: Haunting Voice
entries: You can cause the sound of your voice to originate from any point you can see within 100 feet. While using this ability, all speech and other vocalizations originate from this other location. You cannot use this ability in conjunction with any magical ability that relies on sound, such as Bardic Inspiration, the Verbal components for a spell, instructions for a Suggestion spell, or a command word to activate a magic item. Using this ability requires Concentration.
{@i From 3.5e. Made by Aris}

reward.name: Jumpscare
entries: You’ve learned how to jump and scare someone.

If you spend at least 5 feet of movement to jump to a space within 5 feet of a creature, you can use Magic action to scare a creature and that creature must succeed in a DC13 Wisdom saving throw or have the Frightened condition until the end of your next turn.
{@i Made by Marvin}

reward.name: Just [REDACTED] - Gruesome Horror Sound Effects
entries: When you score a Critical Hit on a Weapon Attack or Unarmed Strike that utilizes blood or has the potential to draw blood from the target, you can choose to add +1 damage to the initial damage roll of the attack if you accompany your attack with at least 3 seconds of improvised bloody squelching sound effects.
{@i Made by Denny}

reward.name: Kindness of Nikolaus
entries: The Interloper god Nikolaus’ power has left a small mark on you.
You can cast Speak with Animals at will. When you cast it this way, you can only speak to a fish or Piranha that you are holding.
{@i Made by Krypt}

reward.name: Ley Line Initiate
entries: In places of great magic, you can attune to the environment to draw upon its power. When you finish a Long Rest in an area, you can attune to it as if it were a magic item until you finish another Long Rest. This fails if the area is not particularly full of magic.

When you attune to an area, you gain a Charm befitting to the area. This Charm goes away if you unattune to the area. The GM decides which Charm you receive. A GM could say that you are affected by the environment in a different way.
The default Charms are as follows:
1 - Charm of Vitality
2 - Charm of the Slayer
3 - Charm of Heroism
4 - Charm of Feather Falling
5 - Charm of Darkvision
6 - Charm of the Water Bearer
Ley Lines and the energy that flows through them can be fickle, ever-shifting, and unpredictable, so your results may vary. (AKA: GM Discretion)
{@i Made by Landon}

reward.name: Maimer's Mercy
entries: You have achieved mastery over your attacks, and can accurately navigate the line between life and death. You can knock out creatures with any attack, not just melee attacks.
{@i Adapted from S2, Made by Corvus}

reward.name: Meticulous Hands
entries: {@i You've learned to slow down and be precise with your movements.}
While you are not wearing gloves, you gain a +5 bonus to Dexterity (Sleight of Hand) checks.
{@i Talent of Gloves of Thievery, Made by June}

reward.name: Mishmash Poison
entries: {@i Prerequisite: Poisoner's Kit Proficiency}
You've learned how to quickly produce simple poisons. Turns out most things aren't meant to be in your bloodstream.
As a Bonus Action, you can use a Poisoner's Kit to create a vial of Basic Poison. You can choose to use the poison as part of the Bonus Action. The poison disappears after 1 hour and cannot be sold.
You can use this Talent a number of times equal to your Proficiency Bonus, regaining all expended uses when you finish a Short or Long Rest.
{@i Made by June}

reward.name: Mountable
entries: {@i Prerequisite: Centaur}
Your anatomy allows you to be an Independent Mount.
{@i Made by Landon}

reward.name: Night Tuning
entries: {@i Prerequisite: Construct}

As part of a short rest, you can tune your eyes for seeing in the dark. While tuned in this way, you gain a Darkvision of 120 ft, however, you have Disadvantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks made in sunlight.
As part of a short rest, you can retune your eyes to see normally.
{@i Made by June}

reward.name: Oratory Savant
entries: When you take the Influence action to convince someone to take a certain course of action or sway them to a different viewpoint, you may make an Intelligence (Persuasion) or Wisdom (Persuasion) check instead of Charisma (Persuasion). You may use this ability a number of times equal to your proficiency bonus per long rest.
{@i Repassed from WM3, Made by Patrick}

reward.name: Ossified Plating
entries: {@i Prerequisite: Construct}

The plates making up your body have been shifted into hardened bone by exposure to aberrant energies. Your movement speed decreases by 10 feet, as the solidified joints find themselves sticking. The hardened carapace grants you a +2 bonus to your Armor Class while not wearing armor.
{@i Made by Lily}

reward.name: Pacifier
entries: "We can do this the easy way, or the hard way..."

When you take the Influence action against a Hostile creature that has one quarter of its Hit Points or fewer remaining to make it Indifferent or Friendly towards you, you gain Advantage on the check.
{@i Made by Patrick}

reward.name: Persistence Hunting
entries: {@i Prerequisite: Ranger}
When you use Favored Enemy to cast Hunter's Mark, you can expend additional uses of it to increase the spell level. The spell level increases by 1 per use expended, to a max of level 5.
{@i Made by June}

reward.name: Plug the Leaks!
entries: Whenever you would make a check to repair a ship, you gain a +5 bonus to said check, with the assumption that the repairs you make are only intended to last a short while, and aren't sustainable in the long term.
You may use Carpenter's Tools to attempt to repair a sailing vessel, so long as said sailing vessel is at a quarter of its Hit Point maximum or lower, as if you were Proficient.
{@i Made by Patrick}

reward.name: Poltergeist Hand
entries: As a Utilize action while you are in the Border Ethereal, you can spectrally reach into the Material Plane and affect the Material Plane within 5 feet of you in any of the following ways: manipulate an object, open an unlocked door or container, stow or retrieve an item from an open container, or pour the contents out of a vial. You can't however attack, activate magic items, or carry more than 10 lbs in this way.
If you know the Mage Hand spell, you can create it in the Material Plane while you are in the Border Ethereal.

reward.name: Realization of Ambition
entries: {@i Prerequisite: Tireless}
When you use Tireless to grant yourself Temporary Hit Points, you gain Advantage on the next {@dice D20} Test you make within the next hour.
{@i Made by June}

reward.name: Realization of Fear
entries: {@i Prerequisite: Halo of Spores}

When your Halo of Spores against a creature, you can attempt to frighten them instead of hurt them. If the creature fails the Constitution saving throw, it takes no damage but becomes Frightened of you until the start of its next turn.
You can use this Talent a number of times equal to your Proficiency Bonus, regaining all uses on a Long Rest.
{@i Made by June}

reward.name: Realization of Love
entries: {@i Prerequisite: Bastion of Law}
Once per turn when a creature protected by your Bastion of Law makes an attack roll or saving throw, it can expend one of the Bastion of Law dice to add {@dice 1d4} to the roll.
{@i Made by June}

reward.name: Realization of Pride
entries: {@i Prerequisite: Valor Bard}

When a creature uses your Bardic Inspiration die to turn a failure into a success, it is filled with pride of its accomplishment. It gains a number of Temporary Hit Points equal to the number rolled on the Bardic Inspiration die plus your Proficiency Bonus. These Temporary Hit Points disappear at the end of its next turn.
{@i Made by June}

reward.name: Scent Sleuth
entries: You’ve learned to leave behind no odor of yourself as you travel.
Creatures cannot benefit from scent-based perception checks on you.
{@i Made by Marvin}

reward.name: Silent Shooter
entries: {@i Prerequisite: Proficiency in Firearms or Martial weapons}
You know how to modify your firearms to fire silently. When you make an attack with a firearm, you can choose for it to make no sound.
{@i Made by Aris}

reward.name: Silken Anchor
entries: {@i Prerequisite: Weaver’s Tools Proficiency}

You learn to use silk to anchor your thrown weapons to your person. When you make a ranged attack roll using a weapon that has the Thrown property, you can use a Bonus Action on the same turn to pull the weapon back to your empty hand.
{@i Made by Chrys}

reward.name: Shattered Remains
entries: When you kill a creature, you can choose for the creature's remains to turn into glass and shatter into pieces. The target can be revived only by a True Resurrection or a Wish spell.
{@i Made by Chrys}

reward.name: Sneaky Poison
entries: {@i Prerequisite: Sneak Attack, Poisoner's Kit Proficiency}
When you deal extra damage with Sneak Attack, you can choose for it to be Poison damage instead of its normal type. To use this ability, you must have a Poisoner's Kit on your person.
{@i Made by June}

reward.name: Sound of Silence
entries: {@i Prerequisite: Bardic Inspiration}
As a Magic action, you can expend a Bardic Inspiration and force a creature within 30 feet to make a Wisdom saving throw. On a failure, the creature has the Deafened condition for 1 minute.
The DC is your Bard spell save DC.
{@i From 3.5e, Made by Aris}

reward.name: Spider Climb
entries: {@i Prerequisite: Climb Speed}
You can move up, down, and across vertical surfaces and along ceilings, while leaving your hands free. However, you can't move this way on a slippery surface, such as one covered by ice or oil.
{@i From S3, Talent of Slippers of Spider Climbing, Made by Aris}

reward.name: Spirit Sight
entries: As a Bonus Action you can open your eyes to the Border Ethereal, allowing you to see into it to a range of 30 feet until the start of your next turn. While you are peering into the Ethereal Plane, you can make weapon attacks against creatures that you can see, even if they are on the Ethereal Plane.
You can take this Bonus Action a number of times equal to your Proficiency Bonus, regaining all expended uses on a Long Rest.
{@i From S3, made by June}

reward.name: Stiff Legs
entries: You do not gain the Prone condition from becoming Unconscious.
{@i Made by June}

reward.name: Stone Carver
entries: {@i Prerequisite: Orc Artificer}
You can create an Orc Stone as part of a Long Rest. It can only be attuned to by a creature who has saved your life.
{@i Made by V}

reward.name: Stonesmith
entries: {@i Prerequisite: Artificer}
You can attune to and use Orc Stones, Elf Stones, Aberration Stones, Giant Stones, Humanoid Stones and similar items regardless of your Recipient status.
{@i Made by Denny}

reward.name: Stunning Abs
entries: Your abs are so truly stunning. As an action while shirtless, you may flex. One creature of your choice within 30 feet must make a DC 8 Wisdom save or be Dazed until the end of its next turn.
{@i Made by Lily}

reward.name: Take chances, make mistakes, and get messy!
entries: When you reroll a die with Heroic Inspiration, if it was a {@dice d20} as part of a {@dice D20} test, you can add {@dice 1d4} to the total.
Once you use this feature, you cannot do so again for the rest of the session.
{@i Made by Landon}

reward.name: The Spin
entries: You may treat individual ball bearings from a pouch as a martial ranged weapon. Ball bearings have the Finesse and Thrown (30/120 ft.) properties. Ball bearings deal {@dice 1d6} Bludgeoning damage on a hit. They have the Vex weapon mastery.
{@i Inspired by Jojo's Bizarre Adventure: Part 7 - Steel Ball Run, Reworked from WM3. Made by Patrick}

reward.name: Thunderdap
entries: {@i Prerequisite: Can cast Thunderclap}
You have learned to enhance the power of thunderclap with the help of allies.

When you cast Thunderclap, choose a friendly creature within 5 feet of you. If they have a free hand, they can use their Reaction to extend their hand, joining in as a source of the Emanation. When an ally joins you, the Emanation's size increases to 10 feet originating from you, and the spell's thunderous sound can be heard from up to 200 feet away. The ally is considered part of the origin, excluding them from the effects of the spell.
{@i Made by Miel}

reward.name: Tidal Dash
entries: When you take the Dash action, you can move through the spaces of other creatures until the end of your turn. If you pass through the space of a creature of your size or smaller during this time, you can force the creature to make a DC 13 Strength saving throw. On a failure, you can push them 5 feet in a direction of your choice. A creature can be pushed only once a turn by this talent.
{@i Repassed from WM3, made by Aris}

reward.name: Trackless Treading
entries: You leave no tracks.
{@i Made by Marvin}

reward.name: Venom's Gift
entries: {@i Prerequisite: Wild Shape}
On your turn, you can spend a use of your Wild Shape to produce Serpent's Venom and coat one of your natural weapons with it (no action required).
{@i From 3.5e, Adapted by Aris}

reward.name: Waxen Face
entries: As a Magic action, you can change your face's appearance. You can't make yourself look like a different person, but you can smooth or deepen your wrinkles, whiten your teeth, hide or accentuate bags under your eyes, or perform other minor cosmetic changes. Your changed appearance lasts 1 hour.
{@i Talent of Mask of Changed Appearance}

reward.name: Well-Studied Illusionist
entries: {@i Prerequisite: Illusionist Wizard}
Silence is added to your spell list, and is treated as a Wizard spell for you.
(This is the only illusion spell in the game that illusionists don't get).
{@i Made by June}

reward.name: Where Do You Think You're Going?
entries: {@i Prerequisite: Grappler}

With incredible training, you've mastered the art of smackin' and snaggin' (yoinkin' and sploinkin', if you will). You can use Punch and Grab on any Unarmed Strike you make, not just ones made as part of the Attack action. You can still only use it once per turn.
{@i Made by Christopher}

reward.name: Winter Wolf Shape
entries: {@i Prerequisite: Moon Druid (Level 9+)}
Winter Wolf is an eligible form for your wildshape.

reward.name: Burnout
entries: {@i Prerequisite: Action Surge}

You've learned a way to push yourself even further with your Action Surge, but it's a little too much. When you use your Action Surge, you can instead gain the effect of the Haste spell until the start of your next turn. The wave of lethargy that strikes you ends at the end of the turn it started.
{@i Made by Coen}

reward.name: Walk of Life
entries: {@i Prerequisite: Wild Shape}

You've developed more control over your Wild Shape's beast forms, allowing you to control how the muscles are developed in the new body as it forms. When you use your Wild Shape feature to shape-shift into a Beast form, you can choose to keep your Strength, Dexterity, or Constitution rather than using the beasts. Shifting this way caused the animal form to become unstable, reducing the maximum time you can stay in the form to 10 minutes.
{@i Made by Coen}

reward.name: Witchlight
entries: As a Magic action, you can touch a creature or object within 5 feet of you. The creature can make a DC 13 Dexterity saving throw to avoid the Witchlight. The target is affected as if by the Faerie Fire spell, except it doesn't grant Advantage on attack rolls. The Witchlight lasts for as long as you maintain Concentration.
When you cast the spell, you can choose for creatures to not perceive the Witchlight. Such creatures perceive the target and any light produced by the Witchlight as if there was no Witchlight.
{@i From 3.5e}

reward.name: Wizard's Last Resort
entries: {@i Prerequisite: Wizard}
You always have Shred Arcane prepared.
{@i Made by June}

reward.name: Dream of Tsien Lei-An
entries: {@b Haunting Possession.} You can touch an Object and cause it to be haunted until you finish a Long Rest. As a Magic action, you can cause the Object to briefly animate in a way you choose. All creatures in a 30 foot Emanation of the Object and that can see or hear it must make a DC 13 Wisdom saving throw or be Frightened until the end of your next turn. You can animate the Object up to 3 times. You cannot haunt an object again until you finish a Long Rest.

{@b Vision of the Sightless.} You can touch an object and grant it sight for 8 hours. As a Magic action, you can see through the object as if you were located where it is. This effect lasts for as long as you maintain Concentration. While you are using your senses at the object's location, you are Blinded and Deafened in regard to your own surroundings. Once you grant an object sight, you cannot do so again until you finish a Long Rest.
{@i Made by Aris}

reward.name: Dream of Tsien Man-Yi
entries: {@b Creaking Step.} If within 5 feet of a Large or bigger tree, you can as a Bonus Action teleport to an unoccupied space within 5 feet of a second Large or bigger tree that is within 60 feet of the previous tree. All creatures within a 5 foot Emanation of where you appear must make a DC 13 Wisdom saving throw or be Frightened until the end of your next turn. Once you use this feature, you cannot do so again until you finish a Long Rest.

{@b Intoxicating Blossoms.} As a Magic action, you can cause a patch of flowers to sprout in a 10-foot square area on the ground you can see within 30 feet. As a Magic action or as part of the action to sprout flowers, you can cause one of your patches of flowers to emit an intoxicating scent. Creatures in the area of the flowers must make a DC 13 Wisdom saving throw. Each creature that fails is either Charmed or Poisoned (your choice) until the end of your next turn. You can cause the intoxicating scent to emit 3 times, and you regain all uses when you finish a Long Rest.
{@i Made by Aris}

reward.name: Dream of Tsien Seu-Mei
entries: {@b Sweet Tooth.} As a Magic action, you can touch a nonmagical Object no larger than Small in size. The Object takes {@dice 6d6} damage if it is inedible, is devoured if it is edible and you regain 5 Hit Points, and if it is edible and sweet, it is devoured and you regain 10 Hit Points. You can do so 3 times, and regain all uses when you finish a Long Rest.

{@b Teeth Nightmare.} As a Magic action, you can target a creature that has teeth within 30 feet and give them a nightmare of their teeth falling out. The creature must make a DC 13 Wisdom saving throw or it is Frightened until the end of your next turn. While Frightened in this way, it cannot make Bite attacks, and it cannot pronounce Verbal components or speak intelligibly. Once you use this feature, you cannot do so again until you finish a Long Rest.
{@i Made by Aris}

reward.name: Dream of Tsien Wai-Ching
entries: {@b Fog Forms.} You cannot get Exhaustion from the Mists of Ravenloft. As a Magic action, you can become incorporeal fog. Until the end of your turn, you can move through creatures and objects as if they were Difficult Terrain. You take {@dice 3d10} Force damage and are shunted to the nearest unoccupied space if you end your turn inside an object. Once you take this action, you cannot do so again until you finish a Long Rest.

{@b Beloved Toys.} When you finish a Long Rest, you can choose a toy in your possession that you had for the entire rest. The toy becomes your beloved toy until you finish a Long Rest. All children are Friendly to you by default while you visibly carry this toy.
